positive: A vibrant, stylized geometric pattern of interconnected celestial elements, featuring abstract nebulae swirls, simplified constellations, and stylized lunar crescents, designed for a t-shirt print. The overall color palette is deep indigo, sapphire blue, teal, and pops of neon cyan and magenta, set against a slightly off-white background for contrast. The style should be minimalist retro-futuristic pop art, with clean, sharp lines, strong silhouettes, and high contrast. Composition must be highly central and repeating enough to fill the space, like a modern textile print. Graphic elements should be easily distinguishable and print-friendly, resembling vector art or woodblock print aesthetics. Studio lighting, perfect symmetry, high detail.
negative: blurry, low resolution, watermark, text, signature, messy, grain, artifact, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, realistic photo, oil painting, monochrome, negative space
